description: Event date and time list item showing a formatted date range or single date, an add-to-calendar button, and an optional registration link.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Single-day event with no registration link

stories.name: WithRegistrationLink
stories.description: Single-day event with a registration link

props.dateText: from Wednesday 20 May 2026 - 12:00pm to Thursday 21 May 2026 - 3:00pm

stories.name: MultiDateNoLink
stories.description: Multi-day event with no registration link

props.dateText: from Tuesday 14 July 2026 - 9:00am to Wednesday 15 July 2026 - 5:00pm

notes: The ev-singledate and ev-multidate classes are mutually exclusive — isMultiDate toggles between them. The event-today class appears on both the root li and the add-to-cal button whenever isToday is true. The add-to-cal button text is always 'Add to calendar' — hardcoded. The .ev-link section with ticket icon renders only when registrationHref is provided.
